children.label: a In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the President to carry out this subchapter (other than ) such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2005 and 2006.section 7513(c) of this title
authorized to remain available until expended; and

in addition to funds otherwise available for such purposes, including, with respect to food assistance under , funds available under title II of the Food for Peace Act [ et seq.], section 1736 of title 7, and .section 7513(a)(1) of this title7 U.S.C. 1721section 1431(b) of title 7o
